title: lamium orientale
intro: Lamium orientale, also known as oriental lamium, is a flowering plant native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Lamium orientale has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. Its extracts and essential oils are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, contributing to its various health benefits, such as reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lamium orientale is often used as an infusion, tincture, or topical cream to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
